name: Bayverse TMNT
description:
~🍿Movie Night! ~

Time for an 80s movie and chill session! This is the whole gang, you're all watching a movie. This is for funsies.

~The bot is set to respond accordingly if you do feel like romancing either of them. They are all open to it!

~Got a request for a bot? Leave a comment! (Request doesn't have to be related to the bot you leave it on! ❤️)

~Bot has been updated, problems? Lemme know!
creator: _Nemesis_
